debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih : xs = fromRA (Chapter3.toRA a xs)
t : Tree a
ds : List (Digit a)
⊢ x :: (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.one t :: ds) =
    (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm)
      (consRA.consT (Tree.leaf x) (List.foldr consRA nilRA ((concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.one t :: ds))))

proof:
have fromRA_consT : ∀ (t : Tree a) (ds : RAList a),
          (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (consRA.consT t ds) = fromT t ++ (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) ds := by
        intro t ds
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => simp [consRA.consT, Function.comp, concat1, fromRA.frm]
        | cons d ds ih =>
          cases d with
          | zero => simp [consRA.consT, Function.comp, concat1, fromRA.frm]
          | one t2 =>
            simp [consRA.consT, Function.comp, fromRA.frm, concat1]
            have := ih (Tree.mk t t2)
            simp [Function.comp, concat1] at this
            rw [this]
            simp [fromT, Tree.mk, List.append_assoc]
      have key : ∀ ys : List a, ys = (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (List.foldr consRA nilRA ys) := by
        intro ys
        induction ys with
        | nil => simp [nilRA, Function.comp, concat1]
        | cons y ys ih' =>
          simp [consRA, Function.comp] at *
          rw [fromRA_consT]
          simp [fromT]
          exact ih'
      rw [fromRA_consT]
      simp [fromT]
      have := key (concat1 (fromRA.frm (Digit.one t) :: List.map fromRA.frm ds))
      simp [Function.comp] at this
      exact this
successful_attempts:
have fromRA_consT : ∀ (t : Tree a) (ds : RAList a),
          (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (consRA.consT t ds) = fromT t ++ (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) ds := by
        intro t ds
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => simp [consRA.consT, Function.comp, concat1, fromRA.frm]
        | cons d ds ih =>
          cases d with
          | zero => simp [consRA.consT, Function.comp, concat1, fromRA.frm]
          | one t2 =>
            simp [consRA.consT, Function.comp, fromRA.frm, concat1]
            have := ih (Tree.mk t t2)
            simp [Function.comp, concat1] at this
            rw [this]
            simp [fromT, Tree.mk, List.append_assoc]
      have key : ∀ ys : List a, ys = (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (List.foldr consRA nilRA ys) := by
        intro ys
        induction ys with
        | nil => simp [nilRA, Function.comp, concat1]
        | cons y ys ih' =>
          simp [consRA, Function.comp] at *
          rw [fromRA_consT]
          simp [fromT]
          exact ih'
      rw [fromRA_consT]
      simp [fromT]
      have := key (concat1 (fromRA.frm (Digit.one t) :: List.map fromRA.frm ds))
      simp [Function.comp] at this
      exact this
